calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT YICK O. WONG AKA JOHN WONG AND AKA J.Y.O. WONG's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property/Housing Court, to be heard on the same date and time. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Notice Motion For Order Setting Aside Defaults And Default Judgments And For An Order Permitting The Filing Of A Responsive Pleading;
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
P. Richard Colombatto, Esq. of Stratman Patterson & Hunter, (510-326-5605), for Yick O. Wong, Defendant and moving party.
Ariel M. Gershon, Esq. of Greenstein & McDonald, (415-773-1240 x351), for Megan Wilson, Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments TAKE the Motion For Order Setting Aside Defaults And Default Judgments And For An Order Permitting The Filing Of A Responsive Pleading UNDER SUBMISSION. Judge Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Req. Default Judment And Short Brief
Off Calendar May-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Jaymee Faith Cadiz Sagisi, Esq., and Ken Greenstein, Esq., appearing for Plaintiffs, Megan Wilson and Laura Andrews.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Yick O. Wong, aka John Wong, aka J.Y.O. Wong.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-5 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff Megan Wilson sworn and examinded on her own behalf. Declaration of Laura Andrews admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Megan Wilson and against Defendant Yick O. Wong, aka John Wong, aka J.Y.O. Wong as follows:

Damages: $472,428.01
Attorney's Fees: $16,805.00
Costs: $810.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $490,043.01
Judgment signed in open court.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Laura Andrews and against Defendant Yick O. Wong, aka John Wong, aka J.Y.O. Wong as follows:

Damages: $10,500.00
Attorney's Fees: 0.00
Costs $0.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $10,500.00
Judgment signed in open court.
